---
title: "hi owo"
author: "Isa Valero Ying"
date: "2026-05-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## About Me

im isa

## Projects

[Project 1](opioid-proj.pdf) 

I, along with my group members in a data science course, completed a project on opioid prescription use for postpartum patients for our data science course. In this project, we filtered and manipulated a messy data set, created visualisations, and performed statistical tests to see what factors impacted opioid use.
